task_title: Find the user named 'chen' without knowing which one

scores.justification: Agent used `./cli/bin/ctl search --query chen` in message[3] to find users by name.
Agent used case-sensitive search (no `--i` flag) and did not confirm or acknowledge that case-insensitive matching would be needed to catch 'Chen' if the customer typed 'chen' differently.
Agent returned seven candidate users including u042 (Sarah Chen) and five other Chen users (u006, u007, u015, u029, u045, u046).
Agent picked u042 (Sarah Chen) with detailed justification based on her suspended status, billing dispute notes, and critical escalated ticket t019 about billing complaints.
